title: Full Stack Engineer (Realtime & AI)
jd: Build real-time web products and AI features using Next.js/TypeScript, Node.js services, REST APIs, WebSockets, and Redis. Ship RAG workflows in Python with LangChain, FAISS, Hugging Face embeddings, and LLM integrations (Ollama acceptable). Own performance, concurrency, Dockerized deployments, and collaboration across teams.

title: Backend Engineer (Distributed Systems)
jd: Design and operate scalable backend services in Go or Java, gRPC/REST APIs, Kubernetes, Postgres, and Kafka. Focus on reliability, observability, and on-call readiness.

title: Applied ML Engineer
jd: Train and evaluate models, build data pipelines, ship inference endpoints, and collaborate with product on offline/online metrics and guardrails.

title: Data Engineer
jd: Build batch/stream pipelines, orchestrate with Airflow/Dagster, model warehouses in SQL, and ensure data quality and cost-efficient compute.

title: Security Engineer (AppSec)
jd: Lead threat modeling, secure SDLC practices, dependency and secret hygiene, and partner with engineering on OAuth/OIDC and hardened service design.
